title: 50 series
flavorText: Fifty series completed. You are the endgame content. The System offers you a throne made of bookmarks.
trigger: Finish 50 complete series.

title: The Chronicler
flavorText: A thousand hours of listening. The System would give you a medal, but it spent the budget on traps.
trigger: Reach 1,000 hours of total listening time.

title: Century Club
flavorText: One hundred books finished. At this point the System isn't rewarding you. It's documenting you.
trigger: Finish 100 books total.

title: 25 series
flavorText: Twenty-five series. You've crushed more arcs than most editors. The System fears your momentum.
trigger: Finish 25 complete series.

title: Deep Diver
flavorText: Five hundred hours. You've been listening long enough to develop plot-based instincts.
trigger: Reach 500 hours of total listening time.

title: Gold Scholar
flavorText: Fifty books. Your brain is now 12% audiobook and 88% opinions. The System approves. Reluctantly.
trigger: Finish 50 books total.

title: Series Master
flavorText: Ten series completed. You don't finish stories. You hunt them.
trigger: Finish 10 complete series.

title: Backlog Resident
flavorText: At this point you should pay rent.
trigger: Finish 50 books by the same author

title: Franchise Loyalist
flavorText: At this point, you're their unpaid marketing team.
trigger: Finish 5 complete series by the same author

title: Catching Up
flavorText: You completed a series with more than ten books. The System calls this 'endurance.' Your friends call it 'a cry for help.'
trigger: Finish a series with more than 10 books.

title: Bibliophile
flavorText: Ten books by the same author. At this point you're funding their coffee habit personally.
trigger: Finish 10 books by the same author.

title: The Epic
flavorText: You finished a book longer than 50 hours. The System has no reward worthy of this. It offers trauma instead.
trigger: Finish a book that is over 50 hours long.

title: Silver Scholar
flavorText: Twenty-five completions. That's not 'a phase.' That's a lifestyle choice.
trigger: Finish 25 books total.

title: Serial Listener
flavorText: Five series completed. The System is updating your title to: 'Problematic.'
trigger: Finish 5 complete series.

title: Narrator Junkie
flavorText: Ten books by the same narrator. You don't listen to books. You listen to a person.
trigger: finish 10 books by the same narrator

title: Main Character Syndrome
flavorText: You don't read authors. You live in their backlog.
trigger: Finish 20 books by the same author

title: Franchise Devotee
flavorText: You don't follow authors. You pledge allegiance.
trigger: Finish 3 complete series by the same author

title: Extreme Binger
flavorText: Sleep is optional. The story is not.
trigger: Any single listening session lasts at least 10 hours

title: Marathon Month
flavorText: One hundred hours in a single month. You didn't have a life that month. You had a playlist.
trigger: Listen 100 hours in a single month

title: Century Club
flavorText: One hundred books in a single year. That's not reading. That's a competitive sport.
trigger: Finish 100 books in a single calendar year

title: The Completionist
flavorText: Fifty achievements unlocked. You didn't just play the game. You beat it. The System has nothing left to teach you.
trigger: Earn 50 other achievements

title: Monthly Grind
flavorText: Twenty days in a month. Consistency beats motivation.
trigger: Listen on 20 distinct days in a single month

title: Committed
flavorText: One hundred hours listened. That's a part-time job you volunteered for.
trigger: Reach 100 hours of total listening time.

title: Weekend Marathon
flavorText: Weekends are for rest. You chose story.
trigger: Listen for at least 10 hours over a single weekend

title: Superfan
flavorText: Five books by the same author. You're not obsessed. You're 'consistent.'
trigger: Finish 5 books by the same author.

title: The Long Haul
flavorText: You finished a book longer than 30 hours. That wasn't a book. That was a hostage situation.
trigger: Finish a book that is over 30 hours long.

title: The Decade
flavorText: Ten books. You've formed a habit. The System suggests you stop pretending otherwise.
trigger: Finish 10 books total.

title: Eclectic Reader
flavorText: You refuse to read the same voice twice.
trigger: Finish books by 10 different authors

title: Page Turner
flavorText: You started it. You finished it. You slept later.
trigger: Finish a book in a single day

title: Speed Reader
flavorText: A 20-hour book in under a week. The System clocked you doing 3x the speed limit.
trigger: Finish a book that is 20+ hours long in under 7 days

title: Daily Listener
flavorText: Seven days straight. The story owns your schedule now.
trigger: Listen on 7 consecutive days

title: Iron Streak
flavorText: Thirty days straight. At this point the audiobook is raising you.
trigger: Listen on 30 consecutive days

title: Completionist Junior
flavorText: Three books. One arc. Zero restraint. The System awards you a small victory and a bigger temptation.
trigger: Finish a trilogy.

title: Binge Listener
flavorText: Just one more chapter turned into half your day.
trigger: Any single listening session lasts at least 5 hours

title: Five-Pack
flavorText: Five books down. You're not addicted. You're 'committed.' That's what the addicts say.
trigger: Finish 5 books total.

title: 1 series
flavorText: You finished an entire series. The System marks it 'cleared' and immediately offers you three more.
trigger: Finish 1 complete series.

title: Side Quest
flavorText: You completed a series with exactly two books. The System respects efficient obsession.
trigger: Finish a series with exactly 2 books.

title: Pointy Hat Approved
flavorText: Magic detected. Hat optional.
trigger: Finish a book with mage OR wizard OR sorcerer in the title

title: Author Collector
flavorText: Five authors. Five voices. Infinite backlog.
trigger: Finish books by 5 different authors

title: Habit Forming
flavorText: Three days in a row. The routine has begun.
trigger: Listen on 3 consecutive days

title: Multi-talented
flavorText: The author narrated their own book. Bold. Intimate. Slightly unhinged.
trigger: Finish a book that is narrated by the author.

title: 2:00 AM: Poor Life Choices
flavorText: You listened past 2 AM on a weeknight. Tomorrow-you is furious. The System is delighted.
trigger: User has any listening session that reaches = 2:00 AM America/New_York, where the local day is Monday - Friday.

title: Early Bird
flavorText: Listening before 6 AM. The sun isn't even up yet but your TBR doesn't care.
trigger: User has any listening session starting before 6:00 AM America/New_York

title: Novella Collector
flavorText: Five short books down. You're basically speedrunning literature.
trigger: Finish 5 books that are under 5 hours long.

title: Short & Sweet
flavorText: You finished a book under 3 hours. Quick. Clean. Suspiciously efficient.
trigger: Finish a book that is under 3 hours long.

title: 20 books
flavorText: Twenty books finished. You now have opinions on narrators you've never met. The System approves of your confidence.
trigger: Finish 20 audiobooks total.

title: First Word
flavorText: You finished your first audiobook. The System is proud. Don't get used to it.
trigger: Finish 1 audiobook.

title: 15 series
flavorText: Fifteen series. That's not dedication. That's a condition. The System recommends sunlight.
trigger: Finish 15 complete series.

title: 2 series
flavorText: Two series down. You're officially the kind of person who says, 'I'll just start the next one.' The System smiles.
trigger: Finish 2 complete series.

title: 20 series
flavorText: Twenty series finished. You've lived multiple lifetimes and still have backlog. The System nods knowingly.
trigger: Finish 20 complete series.

title: Series Starter
flavorText: Five different series started. You are one bad decision away from 40 unfinished arcs.
trigger: Finish the first book of 5 different series.

title: Voice of Reason
flavorText: Five books with the same narrator. That voice lives in your head now. Rent-free.
trigger: finish 5 books by the same narrator

title: Mutual Book Trauma
flavorText: You have at least one completed book in common with every other user. Congratulations. You've built a library-shaped social graph.
trigger: For user U, for every other user V: completed(U) n completed(V) ? Ø

title: Shared Experience
flavorText: Two minds. One book. Same week. The System suspects a book club.
trigger: Two users finish the same book within the same week

title: Dragon Rider
flavorText: You finished a book with 'Dragon' in the title. The System rates your survival odds as 'funny.'
trigger: Finish a book with 'Dragon' in the title.

title: Interstellar
achievement: In Space, Nobody Can Hear You Binge
flavorText: You finished a book with 'Space,' 'Galaxy,' or 'Star' in the title. The vacuum of space has nothing on your attention span.
trigger: Finish a book with 'Space,' 'Galaxy,' or 'Star' in the title.

title: The Dresden Files
flavorText: Take on the supernatural cases that Chicago's only wizard detective dares to solve.
trigger: Complete the The Dresden Files series.

title: The Elder Empire: Sea
flavorText: Command the Guild of Navigators' most dangerous ship through the monster-infested Reading Sea.
trigger: Complete the The Elder Empire: Sea series.

title: The Elder Empire: Shadow
flavorText: Rise through the Blackstone Irregulars and face the Guilds that control the Elder Empire.
trigger: Complete the The Elder Empire: Shadow series.

title: The Embers of War Series
flavorText: Navigate the political fallout after a devastating interstellar war where no side truly won.
trigger: Complete the The Embers of War Series series.

title: The Empire's Corps
flavorText: Fight for humanity's survival as a Marine unit stranded in a galaxy that has forgotten Earth.
trigger: Complete the The Empire's Corps series.

title: The Firebrand Series
flavorText: Lead the resistance against the oppressive empire as the firebrand who ignites the revolution.
trigger: Complete the The Firebrand Series series.

title: The First Law Trilogy
flavorText: Survive the brutal politics and grinding wars of a world where even the heroes are morally bankrupt.
trigger: Complete the The First Law Trilogy series.

title: The Forbidden Library
flavorText: Navigate the dangerous magical library where every book contains something that wants to escape.
trigger: Complete the The Forbidden Library series.

title: The Grand Game
flavorText: Dominate the dungeon-based grand strategy game by mastering every faction and system interaction.
trigger: Complete the The Grand Game series.

title: The Heartfire Healer
flavorText: Use the rare heartfire magic to heal wounds that go deeper than flesh and bone.
trigger: Complete the The Heartfire Healer series.

title: The Hedge Wizard
flavorText: Master the humble hedge wizard arts and prove that so-called minor magic can topple kingdoms.
trigger: Complete the The Hedge Wizard series.

title: The Infinite World
flavorText: Explore the procedurally infinite dungeon world where floors have no theoretical ceiling.
trigger: Complete the The Infinite World series.

title: The Last Horizon
flavorText: Push past the last mapped horizon into territory where the laws of physics break down.
trigger: Complete the The Last Horizon series.

title: The Lord of the Rings
flavorText: Carry the One Ring to the fires of Mount Doom while the Eye of Sauron hunts you across Middle-earth.
trigger: Complete the The Lord of the Rings series.

title: The Portal Wars Saga
flavorText: Control the portal network that links a thousand worlds and keep the wrong things from crossing over.
trigger: Complete the The Portal Wars Saga series.

title: The Starsea Cycle
flavorText: Chart the unmapped star-sea and survive the ancient things that have been sleeping in the deep.
trigger: Complete the The Starsea Cycle series.

title: The Ten Realms
flavorText: Fight your way up through all ten realms and claim a place among the highest powers.
trigger: Complete the The Ten Realms series.

title: The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
flavorText: Claim the weapons of the Traveler and walk the gates between deadly pocket dimensions.
trigger: Complete the The Traveler's Gate Trilogy series.

title: The Viridian Gate Archives
flavorText: Survive the asteroid impact inside the Viridian Gate VR system while the real world ends outside.
trigger: Complete the The Viridian Gate Archives series.

title: The Way of the Shaman
flavorText: Navigate the prison VRMMO Barliona as a shaman and find a way to freedom.
trigger: Complete the The Way of the Shaman series.

title: The Weirkey Chronicles
flavorText: Inscribe your weirkey and navigate the soul space that underpins all of creation.
trigger: Complete the The Weirkey Chronicles series.

title: The Wells of Sorcery Trilogy
flavorText: Descend to the Wells of Sorcery and draw power from the source that feeds all magic.
trigger: Complete the The Wells of Sorcery Trilogy series.

title: The Wheel of Time
flavorText: Follow the Dragon Reborn across the turning of the Wheel and face the Dark One at Tarmon Gai'don.
trigger: Complete the The Wheel of Time series.

title: The Witcher
flavorText: Hunt monsters for coin and navigate the brutal politics of the Northern Kingdoms as the White Wolf.
trigger: Complete the The Witcher series.

title: This Trilogy Is Broken
flavorText: Navigate the catastrophically broken game system where every mechanic is exploitable and nothing works as intended.
trigger: Complete the This Trilogy Is Broken series.

title: Timothy
flavorText: Guide the small but determined Timothy through trials that prove size has no bearing on courage.
trigger: Complete the Timothy series.

title: Tower of Jack
flavorText: Climb the System's infinite tower and face the increasingly terrifying bosses on every floor.
trigger: Complete the Tower of Jack series.

title: Twin Rivers Possession
flavorText: Survive the possession event that splits your consciousness between two supernatural factions.
trigger: Complete the Twin Rivers Possession series.

title: Ultimate Level 1
flavorText: Begin at the highest level the System allows and discover why nobody survives there.
trigger: Complete the Ultimate Level 1 series.

title: United States of Apocalypse
flavorText: Rebuild American civilization from scratch after a System apocalypse reshapes the continent.
trigger: Complete the United States of Apocalypse series.

title: Unorthodox Farming
flavorText: Discover that the System's farming class has wildly broken interactions with every combat skill.
trigger: Complete the Unorthodox Farming series.

title: Victor of Tucson
flavorText: Fight as a modern-day man trapped in a gladiatorial arena culture with a real death consequence.
trigger: Complete the Victor of Tucson series.

title: Vigil Bound
flavorText: Stand the eternal vigil against the forces that press against the boundaries of the mortal world.
trigger: Complete the Vigil Bound series.

title: Virtuous Sons
flavorText: Pursue arete in a Greco-Roman fantasy world where virtue and excellence are measurable divine attributes.
trigger: Complete the Virtuous Sons series.

title: War of Souls
flavorText: Navigate the cataclysmic War of Souls as dragons and gods tear Dragonlance's Krynn apart.
trigger: Complete the War of Souls series.

title: Warspite
flavorText: Command the Warspite through increasingly desperate naval battles in a world of ironclad magic.
trigger: Complete the Warspite series.

title: Wasteland Warlords
flavorText: Carve out a territory in the irradiated wasteland and defend it against every warlord who wants it.
trigger: Complete the Wasteland Warlords series.

title: Weaponsmith Series
flavorText: Smith weapons so perfectly calibrated to their wielders that they become extensions of the soul.
trigger: Complete the Weaponsmith Series series.

title: Welcome to the Multiverse
flavorText: Navigate the infinite multiverse as an accidental dimensional traveler who keeps landing in disaster zones.
trigger: Complete the Welcome to the Multiverse series.

title: World of the Changed
flavorText: Adapt to a world where a random subset of humanity has been Changed into something more and less than human.
trigger: Complete the World of the Changed series.

title: World of Warcraft
flavorText: Answer the call to defend Azeroth against the latest world-ending threat.
trigger: Complete the World of Warcraft series.

title: Wrath of the Stormking
flavorText: Survive the wrath of the Stormking whose power over weather has become a weapon of continental destruction.
trigger: Complete the Wrath of the Stormking series.

title: Zombie Fallout
flavorText: Follow Mike Talbot's desperate fight to protect his family and community as the zombie apocalypse reshapes America.
trigger: Complete the Zombie Fallout series.

title: The Overclocked
flavorText: Your core temperature is critical. The System didn't think you'd survive this many hours. It is... impressed. And hungry.
trigger: Achieve the most listening hours in a 30-day review period.

title: The Librarian's Bane
flavorText: You've shredded the most books in a month. The archives are weeping. The System is making room for your legend.
trigger: Finish the most books in a 30-day review period.

title: The Sleepless
flavorText: Five hours of continuous focus? The System sees you. It remembers you. It suggests you never close your eyes again.
trigger: Execute the longest single listening session in a 30-day review period.

title: Asset Acquired: Cooling Fan
flavorText: The System has detected overheating in your sector. Take this primitive heat-sink. Do not let it stop you from listening.
trigger: Monthly Asset Review: Most Hours Award

title: Asset Acquired: God-Slayer's Arcanum
flavorText: You've consumed more knowledge than is strictly allowed. This tome contains the echoes of deleted archives. Use it to find more.
trigger: Monthly Asset Review: Most Books Award

title: Asset Acquired: Admin Core
flavorText: A fragment of the System's own processing logic. You stayed awake long enough for the barrier to thin. It belongs to you now.
trigger: Monthly Asset Review: Longest Session Award
